account_created.subject: Verify Your Account
account_created.body: Your account has been created. Use the OTP below to verify your email address.

account_verified.subject: Account Verified
account_verified.body: Your account has been successfully verified.

recovery_requested.subject: Account Recovery Request
recovery_requested.body: You requested to recover your account. Use the OTP below to verify your identity.

account_recovered.subject: Account Recovered
account_recovered.body: Your account has been successfully recovered. You can now log in with your new password.

new_device_session.subject: New Device Login
new_device_session.body: A new login was detected on your account from an unrecognized device.
